name: Theron the Bold
who:
Veteran warrior of the Adventurer's Guild
Known for aggressive fighting style and bravery
Uses sword and shield in combat
Potential companion upon completing guild questline
Honors the warrior's code and guild traditions
what:
Guild champion and mentor to new adventurers
Master of defensive combat techniques
Offers training in melee combat
Potential companion if chosen over Sylva
where:
Dalhurst - Adventurer's Guild Hall
Available as companion after questline completion

sprite.notes: Muscular human male in chainmail, sword and shield

dialogue.notes: Direct, confident, values courage and loyalty

combat.notes: Tank build - high HP, good armor, shield abilities

follower.notes: Aggressive melee fighter with crowd control abilities
